causal_chain.from: Observation of the sun's movement across the sky
causal_chain.to: Belief that the sun revolves around the Earth
causal_chain.mechanism: Direct visual interpretation of perceived motion

confounders: Lack of understanding of heliocentric model
missing_links: Absence of understanding of inertia and relative motion
Lack of precise measurements of stellar parallax
Failure to account for the Earth's rotation
